section_22_mappings.description: The handler designated 'Aspect' is actually Alain Aspect, the original founder/architect of the QSA.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: Solis is B-734 residue, not a living architect.
section_22_mappings.description: Martina Solis is a projection/echo (B-734 residue), despite characters believing she is alive and sequestered.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: Chen was replaced by an anomaly; original Chen left a dead-man's switch.
section_22_mappings.description: Marcus Chen was replaced in his apartment; the original Chen successfully triggered a biometric dead-man's switch device before his death.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: Varn's operation contradicts official QSA records.
section_22_mappings.description: Elias Varn's actual operation timeline involves a 4-year gap that the official QSA timeline covers up or denies.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: The laughing woman is B-734 residue / Hayden's subject memory.
section_22_mappings.description: The unidentified laughing woman carrier is a B-734 residue echo of a specific memory belonging to Hayden.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: Kain survived past his two-jumps-left prognosis.
section_22_mappings.description: Despite his clinical prognosis (neurological cascade irreversible within two jumps), Kain survives to the Epilogue state.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: Hayden executed 412 transitions for a larger sustained campaign.
section_22_mappings.description: Hayden's transition count is exactly 412, indicating a massive, hidden, sustained objective beyond the Winters data theft.

section_22_mappings.s22_item: Bell discovers Hayden's ICS data, not Kain's.
section_22_mappings.description: Bell finds the hidden readings of her own partner (Hayden).
